name: places1Places2Missing
sql: SELECT p.label, '/data/projects/' || s.project_id || '/subprojects/' || p.subproject_id || '/places/' || p.place_id || '/place' AS url FROM places p JOIN subprojects s ON s.subproject_id = p.subproject_id WHERE p.subproject_id = $1 AND p.level = 1 AND p.relevant_for_reports = true AND (p.until IS NULL OR p.until >= date_part('year', now())::integer) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM places p2 WHERE p2.parent_id = p.place_id) ORDER BY p.label
